content.storyText: Samreen learned to infer hidden meaning by combining clues from different lines.
content.activityInstructions: Read a passage and answer 3 inference questions with evidence.

content.storyText: Hamid used ratios to adjust recipe quantities for a bigger group.
content.activityInstructions: Solve 4 ratio scenarios and justify method.
content.parentTip: Link ratio to cooking, maps, and sports stats.

content.storyText: Noman improved his experiment by controlling variables and repeating trials.
content.activityInstructions: Plan one fair test and predict outcomes with reasoning.
content.parentTip: Ask for explanation of 'why this is a fair test'.

content.storyText: Students compared renewable and non-renewable resource choices for a town plan.
content.activityInstructions: Classify resources and propose one sustainable choice.

content.storyText: A class explored how one policy changed education, jobs, and family life.
content.activityInstructions: Build a cause-effect chain with 3 consequences.
content.parentTip: Connect past decisions with present outcomes.

content.storyText: Students examined recommendations and voice assistants to see how AI predicts useful outputs.
content.activityInstructions: List two AI use cases, one benefit, and one risk for each.
content.quizConcept: AI awareness, practical use, and safety mindset.
content.parentTip: Encourage verification before trusting AI outputs.

content.storyText: Rehan improved by analyzing mistakes and planning focused revision sessions.
content.activityInstructions: Create weekly plan and end-week reflection.
content.parentTip: Ask what strategy worked best, not only what score came.

content.storyText: A student used pause-think-choose to avoid conflict and find a better solution.
content.activityInstructions: Apply emotion decision model to two scenarios.
content.parentTip: Support children to name feeling before action.

content.storyText: Students redesigned routines and observed better focus and energy.
content.activityInstructions: Audit current routine and propose 3 improvements.

content.storyText: A student compared options and learned that every purchase has a trade-off.
content.activityInstructions: Choose between options with fixed budget and explain decision.
content.parentTip: Ask children to justify choices with reasons.

content.storyText: Yusuf chose honesty despite peer pressure and preserved trust.
content.activityInstructions: Discuss one pressure scenario and ethical response.
